input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.3
            TITLE: monocoque

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.3: Monocoque
F.1.3 Monocoque 
A type of Chassis where loads are supported by the external panels

final_answer: rule F.1.3: Monocoque F.1.3 Monocoque A type of Chassis where loads are supported by the external panels
